overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through Night City's elevated pedestrian walkways at night. The scene features neon-lit futuristic architecture, wet reflective surfaces, and sparse pedestrian activity near a location called 'Fourth Wall'.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation platform overlooking city skyline

events.description: camera pans left to view the illuminated cityscape and glass towers
turning back and entering the covered walkway section

agents.ego_description: standing on the platform looking at the city lights, then beginning to walk along the pathway

entered.detail: wet reflective tiled surface of the pedestrian bridge
tall building with illuminated windows and neon accents
large blue digital advertisement screen glowing against the night sky
safety railing along the edge of the elevated platform
distant cluster of lit skyscrapers and urban lights

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on an elevated platform overlooking Night City. The camera pans across the glass towers and neon billboards before the character turns and begins walking toward a covered section of the walkway. The area is empty of pedestrians, with wet tiles reflecting the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete pedestrian corridor with overhead lighting

events.description: moving deeper into the darker section of the covered walkway
approaching the bright light at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor with reflective wet floors, heading toward the light at the end

notable_agents.action: silhouetted pedestrian walking ahead in the distance toward the exit

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the walkway
thick structural columns lining the left side of the corridor
horizontal cyan neon light strips mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered concrete corridor that blocks the sky. The space is dimly lit by cyan neon strips on the walls, with wet floors reflecting the lights. A distant figure walks ahead toward the bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial promenade with neon signage and outdoor seating

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the open commercial area with the Fourth Wall sign
slowing down while approaching the group of NPCs gathered on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial promenade and approaching a group of NPCs gathered around a blue hoverboard

notable_agents.action: woman in orange jacket and denim shorts standing with hands on hips
person crouching over a blue glowing hoverboard on the ground

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'FOURTH WALL' mounted above the walkway
tropical tree in planter near the building facade
decorative triangular light structures mounted on the railing
small vehicle or object emitting blue light on the ground

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens into a neon-lit commercial area marked by the 'Fourth Wall' sign. The character approaches a group of pedestrians, including a woman in an orange jacket and someone examining a blue glowing hoverboard. Palm trees and digital billboards line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with seating areas and city views

events.description: resuming normal walking speed after passing the group of NPCs

agents.ego_description: continuing down the illuminated walkway past the NPCs, with the camera panning slightly to show the surrounding architecture

entered.detail: metal bench along the railing where a person is seated

segments.scene_description: The character continues past the group of NPCs and proceeds down the walkway. The Fourth Wall sign and palm tree recede behind as the camera moves forward, with the Cirrus billboard now visible further back on the left. The walkway continues with glass railings and bench seating overlooking the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, elevated overlook into a confined urban corridor before emerging into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial plaza. It begins by panning across glass towers and neon billboards before the camera turns to follow a character walking across wet, reflective tiles toward a covered walkway. As the character enters a concrete corridor, the open sky is replaced by dim cyan neon strips and reflective floors, with a distant figure leading the way toward a bright exit. The scene then opens into the Fourth Wall commercial area, where the lighting brightens and the environment fills with palm trees, digital billboards, and pedestrians gathered around a glowing blue hoverboard. Finally, the camera proceeds past the crowd and continues down the walkway, leaving the Fourth Wall sign behind as glass railings and bench seating overlook the sprawling city.
